title: Better Vanilla
description: Optimization, tweaks, visuals and sounds improvements
body:
![BV](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdb8c3931cce4cebdfe65216f31ce3e5263cd849.png)
# 
> ### This modpack focused on clinet-side mods. Add visuals, immersion, performance, and quality-of-life improvements while keeping the original Minecraft gameplay untouched.

**Features**:
* ✨ Improved animations and visual effects
* 🌧 Ambient and environmental sound enhancements
* 🎮 Controller support
* ⚡ Modern optimization mods (Sodium, Lithium, ModernFix, etc.)
* 🎨 OptiFine-style resource pack support (CIT, connected textures, shaders via Iris)

**_Supported Versions:_**

**Stable:**

* 1.21.1 [Fabric]

**Experimental / Outdated:**

* 1.21.8
* 1.21
##
<details>
<summary>How to disable a specific mod?</summary>

* **Most mods are turned off in the "Mods" tab**
* **Punchy (First person mod)** - Go to "Punchy" setting. Click "MOD_TURN_OFF" and then click "Load Profile"
* **Presence Footsteps (Footsteps sounds)**  - Go to "Presence Footsteps" setting and simply switch the "Enable mod"

</details>
